T

toAppointment() - Method in class org.example.domain.WaitlistEntry
Converts this waitlist entry into a confirmed appointment.
toAppointment(AppointmentStatus) - Method in class org.example.domain.WaitlistEntry
Converts this waitlist entry into an appointment with the requested status.
toDialogMessageType(BookingStatus) - Static method in class org.example.presentation.gui.GuiMessageHelper
Resolves a Swing dialog message type for a booking status.
toMessage(BookingStatus) - Static method in class org.example.presentation.gui.GuiMessageHelper
Converts a booking status value into text for dialogs.
toString() - Method in enum class org.example.domain.AppointmentType
Returns the display name of this appointment type.
toString() - Method in class org.example.domain.Credentials
Returns a safe text form without exposing the password.
